title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA 3 Pack Greek Hand Towels - 100% Egyptian Cotton Quick Dry Towel (50x90 cm) - Highly Absorbent Bathroom Hand Towel Set - 550 GSM Towels for Hotel Gym Travel & Skin Friendly, Grey
features: Premium Egyptian Cotton Material - Expertly crafted from 100% pure Egyptian cotton, these hand towels offer unmatched softness, exceptional strength, and timeless comfort for everyday luxury.
Superior Absorbency & Quick Drying - Designed to wick away moisture efficiently, each quick dry hand towel stays fresh, prevents dampness, and provides long-lasting daily convenience.
Elegant Regent Greek Design - Featuring a sophisticated Greek-inspired border, this bathroom hand towel set adds elegance, style, and a luxury hotel touch to any space.
Safe & Eco-Friendly Choice - Made without harsh chemicals or dyes, these white hand towels are breathable, skin-friendly, and environmentally conscious for the whole family.
Easy Care & Maintenance - Fully machine washable, colourfast, and durable; this hand towel set retains softness after frequent washes—avoid harsh detergents, ironing, and open flames.
description: REGENT GREEK TOWELS ★ The super-soft material feels luxuriously smooth against your skin, ideal for helping you keep warm and dry off in comfort after your cleansing routine ★ Dry off quickly and efficiently with these stunning towels, expertly designed to soak up moisture in addition to looking fabulous in your home! ★ Created from high-quality, machine washable fabric, these fabulous towels could not be simpler to care for in the convenience of your own home ★ Whatever your bathroom look, you can find the perfect shade to match from among our exquisite towel set. ★ Material Composition: 100% Egyptian Cotton ★ Set Includes: 3PK Hand Towel : 50 cm x 80 cm 3PK Bath Sheet : 80 cm x 140 cm 2PK Jumbo Bath Sheet : 80 cm x 170 cm ★ Caring Instructions: Machine washable at 40° C Wash Dark Colors Separately Cool iron Do Not Bleach Keep Away From Fire Do Not Iron ★ Brand: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Note: All photographs are for illustration purposes only. Actual colours may slightly vary from the pictures.
